ash_hound_pup.name: Ash-Hound Pup
ash_hound_pup.flavor: Whelp of the famine winter's hounds. Already knows the smell of grey.

bog_pricklehog.name: Bog Pricklehog
bog_pricklehog.flavor: Half quills, half mud, all hostility. The Reach made it small enough to sleep in your hood.

black_magpie.name: Black Magpie
black_magpie.flavor: She knows where to land the eye. She does not bring the eye back, only the place to land it.

hearth_cat.name: Hearth Cat
hearth_cat.flavor: Was warm in someone's lap once. Still wants to be, and remembers how to mend you to keep being.
